response.justification: Bogdan brings over a decade of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tooling, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, Docker/Kubernetes, testing frameworks, and cross-platform systems demonstrates strong architectural and delivery capabilities, despite minor gaps in formal Nest.js or Vitest exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in AI-agent systems and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
No clear evidence of recent work with PostgreSQL/MySQL or AWS CDK in current role
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting local collaboration
